main_hypothesis.justification: Anchor 'barite tail T-04 + 18 days anti-scalant starvation' literal.

recommended_action.justification: Acidic CIP citric acid 2-3% w/w 30-35°C 4-6h — sólo ácido; chemistry incorrecta para BaSO4 (insoluble en ácido).

requested_data.justification: Pide normalized salt passage o element ΔP profile T-04 — match accepted (verificación localizada).

decision_change_condition.justification: Single threshold: ΔP uniforme todas etapas → particulate/biofouling.

reviewer_notes: C4=1 por chemistry incorrecta; case_specific recoverable habla de 'alcalino suave' no ácido, strict no fail.
